---
pagetitle: "Committee members"

listing:
  - id: organizers
    template: organizers.ejs
    contents: organizers.yml
---

::: grid
::: {#organizers_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Organizers
This bioinformatics mini project conference is part of the undergraduate course Bioinformatics (BISB211606).  
Organized by the Department of Tropical Biology, Faculty of Biology, Universitas Gadjah Mada (UGM).

:::

::: {#organizers .g-col-12}
:::

<div></div>
:::
